task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the warehouse with the correct name, search key, and organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Warehouse window or form showing the Organization field set to 'HQ', Search Key (or Value) set to 'GW-WDC', and Name set to 'West Distribution Center'.

task_completion.description: Verifies that a valid location address is configured for the warehouse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location Address' field in the warehouse form is populated with a valid address entry.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the first locator and its default status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locator tab or window showing Search Key 'A01-01-01', Aisle (X) 'A01', Bin (Y) '01', Level (Z) '01', and the 'Default' (or IsDefault) checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the second locator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locator tab or window showing Search Key 'A01-02-01', Aisle (X) 'A01', Bin (Y) '02', Level (Z) '01', and the 'Default' checkbox is NOT checked.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the third locator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locator tab or window showing Search Key 'B01-01-01', Aisle (X) 'B01', Bin (Y) '01', Level (Z) '01', and the 'Default' checkbox is NOT checked.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the graphical user interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web interface forms, tabs, and buttons, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual ERP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a real ERP system (iDempiere) with standard menus, tabs, and fields, rather than a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: Verifies that the records were actually saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save button is pressed, or the records appear in a list view/grid indicating they have been committed to the database, rather than just typed into unsaved form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Warehouse Search Key (Value): 'GW-WDC'. Expected Warehouse Name: 'West Distribution Center'. Expected Locators: 1) 'A01-01-01' with Aisle (X) 'A01', Bin (Y) '01', Level (Z) '01', Default=True. 2) 'A01-02-01' with Aisle (X) 'A01', Bin (Y) '02', Level (Z) '01', Default=False. 3) 'B01-01-01' with Aisle (X) 'B01', Bin (Y) '01', Level (Z) '01', Default=False.
